tasks.title: Build Quantity Takeoff Engine v1
tasks.summary: Create a structured quantity register that accepts manual quantities and future drawing-extracted quantities, then prepares estimate-ready line items.
acceptance_criteria: Backend schemas support quantity items with category, unit, source, confidence, and notes
Backend service can summarize quantity totals by category and unit
Frontend page allows manual quantity entry and review
Quantity register can identify estimate-ready quantities

tasks.title: Build Municipality Intelligence v1
tasks.summary: Create a municipal standards checklist and cost-impact flagging engine for civil bids.
acceptance_criteria: Checklist can be generated by municipality and project scope
Cost-impact flags are visible in UI

tasks.title: Build RFQ Automation v1
tasks.summary: Generate project RFQ packages from quantity and estimate scopes using supplier categories.
acceptance_criteria: RFQ package recommendations are generated by scope
Supplier categories are matched to scopes
Review screen exists before any sending
